parents.subject: LU-17916 quota: switch to folio of order 0

commit.subject: LU-13670 tests: fix sanity-quota/6+7 issues
commit.message:
LU-13670 tests: fix sanity-quota/6+7 issues

Fix bug in test_7e where it incorrectly used the MDT UUID
instead of the MDT name when calling test-framework.sh::getquota(),
but the syntax errors produced would not cause the script to fail.

Fix interop check in test_7f, it used 2.16.5x instead of 2.17.5x.

Fix bash code style in test_6 and test_7:
- use lower-case variable names for local variables
- use ((...)) for numeric comparisons
- use [[...]] for string comparisons
- use "check || action" style to avoid lingering error return

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota
Fixes: f37e9527ef ("LU-18079 tests: updating getquota() in sanity-quota")
Fixes: f33ac875ca ("LU-19136 quota: sync quota setting periodically")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I76dce9486912881f2c2d74f3759300759a300c1e
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59927
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
